text:
Art Meets Science
Art Meets Science Lecture Series explores the intersections between these two creative approaches to learning about the world around us. In this special series, SLAC welcomes the public to presentations that celebrate the confluence of art and science. These lectures are free and open to all but registration is required.
There are currently no events scheduled in this series. Please visit our events page for more information.
Sign up for SLAC events newsletter
